name: My work comp claim got denied, can I still get paid?
description: Yes, appeal/hearing within deadlines—most win with good evidence.

mainEntity.name: My work comp claim got denied, can I still get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, appeal/hearing within deadlines—most win with good evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, appeal by requesting a hearing (Form 33 in some states, similar in UT/ID within 1-2 years); many denials overturn with evidence. Key factors: Common denials for late report or pre-existing issues; gather witnesses/medicals. No upfront fees; win gets backpay. File promptly and get attorney experienced in hearings.
